message:
test(fcp-e2e): add dangerous-delete receipt and audit evidence compliance test

Extends the Trello compliance E2E suite with a new test exercising the
receipt-tracking and audit-event-id evidence chain for destructive
operations.

- trello_dangerous_delete_emits_receipt_audit_and_stable_evidence:
  Invokes trello.cards.delete through the full connector suite pipeline,
  asserting that the InvokeResponse carries both a receipt_id and an
  audit_event_id generated via stable_object_id hashing. Verifies
  the E2E runner's log entries contain matching evidence fields.
- TrelloConnectorAdapter::invoke: enriched to attach receipt_id and
  audit_event_id on delete operations via with_receipt_id() and
  with_audit_event_id() builders
- InvokeExpectations: configured with expect_receipt: true and
  expect_audit_event: true to exercise the receipt validation path

This ensures destructive connector operations produce auditable evidence
chains that can be verified by compliance tooling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
